title: Operate commercial lawnmowers
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate commercial lawnmowers demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare site to be mown

pcs.text: Confirm site to be mown and identify potential hazards and risks including obstacles and fixtures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm site to be mown and identify potential hazards and risks including obstacles and fixtures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm site to be mown and identify potential hazards and risks including obstacles and fixtures.

pcs.text: Implement safe working practices to manage risks including removal and replacement obstacles before and after mowing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement safe working practices to manage risks including removal and replacement obstacles before and after mowing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement safe working practices to manage risks including removal and replacement obstacles before and after mowing.

pcs.text: Report abnormal conditions or changes in the appearance of the site and existing grass surface
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report abnormal conditions or changes in the appearance of the site and existing grass surface?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report abnormal conditions or changes in the appearance of the site and existing grass surface.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare site to be mown

elements.title: Prepare equipment for mowing

pcs.text: Select appropriate tools, equipment and machinery for site to be mown
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select appropriate tools, equipment and machinery for site to be mown?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select appropriate tools, equipment and machinery for site to be mown.

pcs.text: Calibrate lawnmower and adjust to height according to manufacturer guidelines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calibrate lawnmower and adjust to height according to manufacturer guidelines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calibrate lawnmower and adjust to height according to manufacturer guidelines.

pcs.text: Complete pre-operational checks of tools, equipment and machinery
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete pre-operational checks of tools, equipment and machinery?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete pre-operational checks of tools, equipment and machinery.

pcs.text: Select and maintain personal protective equipment according to workplace safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and maintain personal protective equipment according to workplace safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and maintain personal protective equipment according to workplace safety requirements.

pcs.text: Fit and use personal protective equipment according to job requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Fit and use personal protective equipment according to job requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Fit and use personal protective equipment according to job requirements.

pcs.text: Erect safety warning notices during work periods
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Erect safety warning notices during work periods?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Erect safety warning notices during work periods.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare equipment for mowing

elements.title: Mow site surface

pcs.text: Assess grass appearance and changes during mowing operations in line with requirements for the site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess grass appearance and changes during mowing operations in line with requirements for the site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess grass appearance and changes during mowing operations in line with requirements for the site.

pcs.text: Match implements to the lawnmower according to manufacturers' specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Match implements to the lawnmower according to manufacturers' specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Match implements to the lawnmower according to manufacturers' specifications.

pcs.text: Maintain continuous oversight of mowing activities including monitoring of hazards and risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain continuous oversight of mowing activities including monitoring of hazards and risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain continuous oversight of mowing activities including monitoring of hazards and risks.

pcs.text: Identify environmental impacts associated with operation of equipment and minimise where possible
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental impacts associated with operation of equipment and minimise where possible?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental impacts associated with operation of equipment and minimise where possible.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Mow site surface

elements.title: Complete mowing and check lawnmower operation

pcs.text: Conduct shut down procedures in line with workplace practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct shut down procedures in line with workplace practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct shut down procedures in line with workplace practices.

pcs.text: Perform routine operational servicing and minor maintenance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform routine operational servicing and minor maintenance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform routine operational servicing and minor maintenance.

pcs.text: Identify and report malfunctions, faults, irregular performance or damage in required format
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report malfunctions, faults, irregular performance or damage in required format?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report malfunctions, faults, irregular performance or damage in required format.

pcs.text: Clean and store lawnmower and associated equipment in the required location
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and store lawnmower and associated equipment in the required location?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and store lawnmower and associated equipment in the required location.

pcs.text: Maintain lawnmower use records in required format
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain lawnmower use records in required format?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain lawnmower use records in required format.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete mowing and check lawnmower operation
